raw_text: Bahut hi bura experience raha. Maine Instamart se induction order kiya tha aur offer ke saath ₹1 mein Black Pepper bhi add kiya tha. Delivery ke time induction to mil gaya, lekin ₹1 wala Black Pepper deliver hi nahi hua. Yeh customer ko offer dikha kar attract karna aur phir product na dena bilkul galat hai. Agar koi item available nahi tha, to pehle hi batana chahiye tha ya proper replacement/refund dena chahiye tha. Is tarah ki service se customer ka trust toot jata hai. Umeed hai I

InstaMart is amazingly useful for buying household necessities for those who have very busy schedules and do not have time to go shopping. Its almost a necessity. However, stability is something that still eludes this app, especially for those who travel a lot with many delivery addresses. Fortunately Swiggy (mostly stable, mature) is there as data seems shared.
